user.title: Travel Time Setup
user.description:
Choose a routing provider and give your route a name.

**OSRM** is free and requires no API key.
**OpenRouteService** requires a free API key from openrouteservice.org.
**Google Maps** requires a Google Cloud API key with Directions API enabled.

ors_api_key.title: OpenRouteService API Key
ors_api_key.description: Enter your free API key from [openrouteservice.org](https://openrouteservice.org/dev/#/signup).

google_api_key.title: Google Maps API Key
google_api_key.description: Enter your Google Maps API key with Directions API enabled.

ors_selfhost.title: Self-Hosted OpenRouteService
ors_selfhost.description: Enter the URL of your self-hosted OpenRouteService instance.

options.title: Travel Options
options.description: Configure travel mode and optional arrival/departure times.

reauth.title: Update API Key
reauth.description: Your API key is no longer valid. Please enter a new one.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the routing service.
error.invalid_location: Invalid location format. Use: latitude, longitude

abort.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the routing service.
